$comment: Enrichment overlay for auto-generated OpenAPI spec. See openapi-enrichments-paths.json for endpoint-level enrichments.

System.description: Health checks and system status endpoints.

Auth.description: Authentication and session management. All auth endpoints use Firebase for identity verification.

Admins.description: Manage admin users — update profiles, emails, and permissions.

Agents.description: Agent operations — search agents, retrieve opportunities, and manage agent-related data.

AppConfigs.description: Application configuration — feature flags and app settings per platform (dashboard, admin, mobile).

Automated Valuation Models.description: Automated property valuation using third-party data sources.

Broadcast.description: Broadcast messaging — send communications to groups of users via SMS, email, or push notifications.

Brokerages.description: Brokerage management — create, update, and manage real estate brokerage records and associations.

Calendars.description: Calendar management — scheduling, availability, and calendar configuration for meetings and onsite visits.

Case Studies.description: Case study management for marketing materials and website content.

Contacts.description: Create, search, and manage contacts associated with deals and opportunities.

Contractors.description: Contractor management — profiles, assignments, dashboards, and contractor-related operations.

Contracts.description: Document contracts — creation, signing sessions, status tracking, and PandaDoc integration.

Deals.description: Deal creation and pipeline management in HubSpot.

Esignatures.description: Electronic signature management via PandaDoc — document status and signing workflows.

Estimates.description: Create, update, duplicate, and manage renovation estimates and change orders with line items from the product catalog.

Follow Up Boss.description: Integration with Follow Up Boss CRM — sync contacts, leads, and deal data.

Homes.description: Home records — create, retrieve, and manage home details and associated property data.

Marketing Center.description: Marketing tools — flyers, brochures, campaigns, and marketing material management for agents.

Media.description: File and media management — upload, retrieve, organize, and delete photos, documents, and attachments.

Meetings.description: Meeting scheduling — book, update, and manage meetings between agents, homeowners, and contractors.

Migrations.description: Data migration utilities for internal platform upgrades.

Notifications.description: Push notifications and in-app messaging — send targeted alerts to users across platforms.

Onsite Visits.description: Onsite visit scheduling, tracking, and management for property inspections and contractor walkthroughs.

Opportunities.description: Deal opportunities — create, update, associate contacts, track status, and manage onsite visits.

Partners.description: Partner management — affiliate and referral partner records.

Payments.description: Payment processing via Stripe — checkout sessions, subscriptions, payment intents, and webhook handling.

Predictions.description: AI image generation — create and poll async prediction jobs for material and design visualizations.

Production.description: Production environment management and deployment status.

Project Scopes.description: Project scope management — line items, scope changes, and renovation project tracking.

Properties.description: HubSpot property definitions — retrieve custom property metadata for objects.

Property.description: Property data — lookups, valuations, images, reports, comparables, and property-related analytics.

Punch List.description: Punch list management — track outstanding items and tasks for renovation project completion.

Realtors.description: Realtor profiles — create and retrieve realtor contact information.

Referrals.description: Referral tracking — create, update, and manage referral records and attribution across deal types.

Reimagine.description: AI-powered home reimagining — generate design visualizations and renovation previews using AI image generation.

Reports.description: Report generation — annual reports, analytics exports, and data summaries.

Ret Catalog.description: Renovation product catalog — browse product types, options, selections, and pricing for estimates.

Rma.description: Renovation Management Agreements — create, manage, track contracts, handle draws, and manage signing workflows.

Support.description: Support ticket submission — create tickets with contact details and issue descriptions.

Users.description: Platform user management — create, retrieve, update, and delete users with role-based access.

Utility.description: Utility endpoints — multi-source home image lookups, image deduplication, and market health checks.

Vision Ai.description: AI-powered property analysis — condition reports, photo analysis, neighborhood reports, scraping tools, and renovation recommendations.

Webhooks.description: Inbound webhook handlers for HubSpot, PandaDoc, affiliate partners, and other third-party integrations.

WeeklyUpdates.description: Weekly renovation progress updates — create, view, edit, and delete update reports for active projects.

Analyze.description: Property analysis tools — AI condition assessment, comparable property lookup, photo analysis, and full report generation.
